query: What happens if I exceed my monthly data allowance on my postpaid plan?
context: Data Usage Policy (Updated January 2026): Postpaid customers who exceed their monthly data allowance will have their speeds reduced to 128 Kbps for the remainder of the billing cycle. No overage charges are applied automatically. Customers can purchase additional data top-ups in increments of 1GB ($5), 5GB ($20), or 10GB ($35) through the self-care app, USSD *123#, or by contacting customer support. Speed throttling is lifted at the start of the next billing cycle or upon purchasing a top-up. Unlimited plan customers are subject to a fair usage policy of 100GB, after which speeds may be deprioritized during peak hours.
ground_truth: If you exceed your data allowance, speeds are reduced to 128 Kbps for the rest of the billing cycle with no automatic overage charges. You can buy top-ups (1GB/$5, 5GB/$20, 10GB/$35) via the app, USSD *123#, or customer support. Unlimited plans have a 100GB fair usage limit.

query: What are the roaming rates when I travel to the EU?
context: International Roaming Rates - European Union (Effective March 2026): Standard roaming: Calls made $0.45/min, calls received $0.20/min, SMS sent $0.15, data $8/MB. EU Travel Pack ($15/day): Unlimited calls and SMS within EU and back to home country, 2GB daily data at 4G speeds. EU Weekly Pass ($59/week): Unlimited calls and SMS, 10GB data per week at 4G speeds. Data alerts are sent at 50%, 80%, and 100% of data usage. To activate a roaming pack, use the self-care app, send 'ROAM EU' to 5050, or call customer service before departure. Roaming packs must be activated before crossing the border. All prices include applicable taxes.
ground_truth: Standard EU roaming: calls $0.45/min out, $0.20/min in, SMS $0.15, data $8/MB. EU Travel Pack costs $15/day (unlimited calls/SMS, 2GB data). EU Weekly Pass costs $59/week (unlimited calls/SMS, 10GB data). Activate via app, SMS 'ROAM EU' to 5050, or call support before departure.

query: How do I port my number from another carrier to your network?
context: Number Portability Guide (MNP): To port your existing mobile number to our network: 1) Request a PAC (Porting Authorization Code) from your current provider. The PAC is valid for 30 days. 2) Visit any of our retail stores with a valid government-issued ID, your PAC code, and the last bill from your current provider. Alternatively, complete the online porting form at myaccount.telco.com/port. 3) Choose your new plan and SIM card (standard, micro, nano, or eSIM). 4) Porting is typically completed within 1-2 business days. During the transfer, you may experience up to 2 hours of service interruption. 5) Your old SIM will be deactivated once porting is complete. There is no fee for number porting. Corporate accounts with more than 5 lines require coordination with our business support team.
ground_truth: To port your number: get a PAC from your current provider (valid 30 days), then visit a store with ID and last bill, or use the online form. Choose a plan and SIM type. Porting takes 1-2 business days with up to 2 hours of interruption. There is no porting fee. Corporate accounts with 5+ lines need business support.

query: What is the early termination fee if I cancel my contract?
context: Contract Terms and Early Termination Policy (v5.1): Customers on fixed-term contracts (12 or 24 months) who wish to cancel before the contract end date will incur an early termination fee (ETF). The ETF is calculated as follows: Monthly plan fee × remaining months × 50%. For example, a customer on a $60/month plan with 6 months remaining would pay $60 × 6 × 0.50 = $180 ETF. Device financing balances, if any, become immediately due in full upon cancellation. Customers within the first 14 days of a new contract may cancel without penalty under the cooling-off period, provided the device is returned in original condition. Month-to-month customers can cancel at any time with 30 days notice and no ETF. Retention offers may be available — customers are encouraged to contact the retention team before finalizing cancellation.
ground_truth: The early termination fee is monthly fee × remaining months × 50%. Device financing balances become due immediately. There is a 14-day cooling-off period for new contracts. Month-to-month customers can cancel with 30 days notice and no fee. Contact the retention team for possible offers before cancelling.

query: What 5G plans do you offer and what coverage areas are available?
context: 5G Plans and Coverage (Updated February 2026): We offer three 5G plans: 5G Essential ($45/month, 30GB data, unlimited calls/SMS), 5G Plus ($65/month, 80GB data, unlimited calls/SMS, 10GB roaming included), and 5G Unlimited ($85/month, unlimited data with 150GB priority data, unlimited calls/SMS, 20GB roaming, free streaming bundle). All 5G plans include HD voice calling and Wi-Fi calling at no extra cost. 5G coverage is currently available in 85 cities nationwide including New York, Los Angeles, Chicago, Houston, Phoenix, Philadelphia, San Antonio, San Diego, Dallas, and San Jose. Suburban expansion is ongoing with 40 additional cities planned by Q4 2026. 5G-capable device required. Customers in areas without 5G coverage will automatically fall back to 4G LTE at no additional charge.
ground_truth: Three 5G plans: Essential ($45/mo, 30GB), Plus ($65/mo, 80GB + 10GB roaming), Unlimited ($85/mo, unlimited with 150GB priority + 20GB roaming + streaming bundle). Coverage in 85 cities with 40 more planned by Q4 2026. 5G device required; automatic 4G fallback in non-5G areas.

query: How do I set up my new home broadband router?
context: Home Broadband Quick Start Guide (ZX-HomeFiber-300): 1) Connect the fiber cable from the wall outlet to the WAN port on the router (green port). 2) Connect the power adapter and press the power button. The router takes approximately 3 minutes to fully boot — wait for the Status LED to turn solid green. 3) Connect your device to the WiFi network. The default network name (SSID) and password are printed on the label underneath the router. 4) Open a web browser and navigate to 192.168.1.1. Use admin/admin as default credentials. 5) The setup wizard will guide you through changing your WiFi name, password, and selecting your preferred security mode (WPA3 recommended). 6) For optimal performance, place the router in a central location away from walls and electronic devices. If you experience weak signal in some rooms, contact us about our WiFi Mesh extender add-on ($5/month). Troubleshooting: If the Status LED is red, ensure the fiber cable is securely connected and restart the router.
ground_truth: Connect fiber to the WAN port, power on, and wait 3 minutes for the green Status LED. Connect to WiFi using credentials on the router label. Go to 192.168.1.1 (admin/admin) to run the setup wizard for WiFi name, password, and security (WPA3 recommended). Place centrally for best coverage. WiFi Mesh extender available for $5/month. Red LED means check fiber cable and restart.

query: What warranty does my phone have if I bought it through your device financing program?
context: Device Warranty and Financing Terms: All devices purchased through our financing program come with a standard 24-month manufacturer warranty covering hardware defects and malfunctions under normal use. The warranty does NOT cover: accidental damage (drops, liquid damage, cracked screens), unauthorized repairs or modifications, cosmetic damage, or battery degradation below 80% capacity. Warranty claims can be filed at any retail store or through the self-care app under My Devices > Warranty Claim. Processing takes 5-7 business days. During the warranty period, a replacement or refurbished device will be provided. For additional protection, customers can enroll in our Device Protection Plan ($9.99/month) which covers accidental damage, theft, and loss with a deductible of $50-$150 depending on the device tier. Device financing terms: 0% interest over 24 months, added to your monthly bill. Early device payoff is available at any time without penalty.
ground_truth: Financed devices have a 24-month manufacturer warranty for hardware defects (excludes accidental damage, liquid damage, unauthorized repairs, and battery degradation). File claims at a store or via the app; processing takes 5-7 days. Optional Device Protection Plan ($9.99/month) covers accidental damage, theft, and loss. Financing is 0% over 24 months with early payoff available.

query: How do I dispute a charge on my bill?
context: Billing Dispute Process: If you believe there is an error on your bill, you may file a billing dispute within 90 days of the bill date. To file a dispute: 1) Log into your account at myaccount.telco.com or the self-care app and go to Billing > Dispute a Charge. 2) Select the specific charge(s) you wish to dispute and provide a brief description of the issue. 3) Attach any supporting documentation if available. 4) A case number will be generated and sent to your registered email. Resolution timeline: Simple billing errors (duplicate charges, incorrect plan fees) are typically resolved within 3-5 business days. Complex disputes involving third-party charges or usage verification may take up to 15 business days. During the dispute investigation, the disputed amount will be placed on hold and you will not be required to pay it. If the dispute is resolved in your favor, a credit will be applied to your next bill. You may also call our billing support line at 1-800-555-BILL for assistance.
ground_truth: File a billing dispute within 90 days via myaccount.telco.com or the app under Billing > Dispute a Charge. Select the charge, describe the issue, and attach documentation. Simple errors resolve in 3-5 business days; complex disputes up to 15 days. The disputed amount is placed on hold during investigation. Credits are applied to your next bill if resolved in your favor.
